import json
from itertools import chain
from more_itertools import chunked, unique_everseen


def process_data(nested, chunk_size):
    flat = list(chain.from_iterable(nested))
    chunks = list(chunked(flat, chunk_size))
    unique = list(unique_everseen(flat))
    return flat, chunks, unique


def safe_parse(text, default=None):
    try:
        return json.loads(text)
    except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError):
        return default


data = process_data([[1, 2], [3, 4]], 2)
parsed = safe_parse('{"a": 1}')
